---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

:::{.hero-section}
# Colombian Fintech Customer Analytics

An interactive visual analytics platform for exploring customer structure, digital engagement, and retention patterns in a Colombian fintech dataset.

[Explore Project](proposal.qmd){.btn-primary}
[Launch Shiny App](shiny.qmd){.btn-secondary}
:::

## Project Background

The rapid growth of digital financial services has made customer analytics increasingly important for fintech platforms. Understanding who customers are, how they engage with products and services, and which groups are at greater risk of churn can support more effective product design, customer retention, and business decision-making.

This project focuses on a Colombian fintech customer dataset and develops a web-enabled visual analytics application to support interactive analysis of customer behaviour and value.

## Why This Project Matters

This project combines three important perspectives:

- **Colombian context**: customer data from an emerging Latin American digital finance environment  
- **Fintech context**: platform usage, product adoption, service interaction, and customer risk  
- **Customer analytics context**: segmentation, engagement, and retention/value analysis  

Together, these perspectives allow us to build a system that is not only descriptive, but also analytically useful for understanding customer dynamics.

## Project Storyline

The application is organised into three analytical modules:

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4 .card-block}
### 1. Customer Overview & Segmentation
Understand the structure of the customer base through demographic, acquisition, and product adoption patterns.
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .card-block}
### 2. Customer Engagement & Experience
Explore customer interaction with the platform through usage behaviour, support experience, satisfaction, and feedback.
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .card-block}
### 3. Retention Risk & Customer Value
Identify high-value and high-risk customer groups through churn probability, transaction behaviour, and lifetime value metrics.
:::
:::

## Analytical Flow

The visual analytics workflow follows a progressive structure:

**Customer Structure → Engagement & Experience → Retention & Value**

This progression supports a more coherent user journey and turns the project into an integrated analytical system rather than a collection of isolated charts.

## Project Components

This project consists of two connected parts:

- **Project Website**: proposal, storyboard, module write-ups, poster, meeting minutes, and user guide  
- **Shiny Application**: interactive visual analytics dashboard for customer exploration and analysis  

## Next Steps

As the project develops, this website will be updated with:

- the final proposal and storyboard  
- module findings and interface designs  
- user guide and poster  
- a link to the deployed Shiny app
